description: Style NoteLet the apple of your eye enjoy some style in this T-shirt from gini and jony. Stylized with an interesting graphic print, team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that super cool look.Product DetailsWhite sleeveless round neck T-shirt has a ribbed collar in contrast colour, graphic print on the front and back, branding appliquéd on the left chest and brand tag on the hemMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash in cold water using a mild detergent with like coloursDo not tumble dry, bleach or soakWash and dry inside out in shadeWarm iron only, do not iron on print/embroidery
